steps: Read .agent/rules/project-map.md and .agent/rules/deployment-boundaries.md.
Create docs/03-testing-deployment/local-demo-runbook.md to instruct local frontend & backend launch.
Explain how to use localhost secure context for camera/mic media permissions.
Include mock teacher/student accounts for easy local sandbox login testing.
Reference and link .agent/workflows/devops-smoke-test.md for verification steps.
Explain Vercel deployment as the secure HTTPS frontend shareable path.
Explicitly document the 20MB+ upload limit over rewrite proxy (explain 502 router external connection error).
Detail environment variables required for Vercel production.
Provide quick-smoke checks for lightweight API paths and request flow.
Document tencent direct HTTP public IP direct route facts (http://101.34.72.227/api/v1).
Integrate TAT patch-deploy methodology from .agent/skills/tencent-tat-patch-deploy/SKILL.md.
Include health/login smoke steps and warnings about HTTP insecure media context limits.
Add release-note and rollback rules avoiding overwriting manual Caddy/Docker configs.
Configure .github/workflows/ci.yml using node 18/20 matrix or a single safe build.
Run npm ci.
Run existing scripts: lint, build, backend:test.
Ensure no credentials or secrets are leaked or required for basic PR validation.
Create .agent/workflows/prototype-vibe-coding.md.
Establish screen-first design guidelines to focus on the primary user path.
Ensure MVP scope rules prevent SaaS/LMS scope bloat during prototype iteration.
Specify review and validation gates before merging UI layout updates.
Define workflow in .agent/workflows/technical-research.md.
Instruct how to write actionable decision notes separating facts from assumptions.
Mandate reliance on official cloud, browser, and API specs.
Enforce a repository-impact assessment section including rollback paths.
Create docs/CONTRIBUTING.md or update README.md.
Provide quick-start onboarding instructions for new external developers.
List repository layout, basic testing commands, and PR rules.
Highlight security bounds: strict prohibition of real secrets and private media uploads.
Create docs/03-testing-deployment/env-matrix.md to list variables by lane.
Update .env.example with descriptive comments.
Clarify VITE_API_BASE_URL resolution, build-time vs runtime variables, and required fields.
Audit to ensure no default credentials or secrets are leaked.
